---
title : "UNESCO Recommendation on Open Science"
date : "2021-01-01"
author : ["{UNESCO}"]
categories : ["Report"]
publication : "  UNESCO"
publication_short : "  UNESCO"
abstract : "UNESCO Digital Library"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

UNESCO (2021). *UNESCO Recommendation on Open Science*.   UNESCO

:::
